options.a: strong downdraughts occur and the temperature in the cloud is much higher than in the surrounding air at the same height.
options.b: strong updraughts occur and the temperature in the cloud is lower than in the surrounding air at the same height.
options.c: weak vertical air motion exists and the temperature in the cloud is lower than in the surrounding air at the same height.
options.d: strong updraughts occur and the temperature in the cloud is higher than in the surrounding air at the same height.
